headline: How The AdvanSix (ASIX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Valuation And Cash Flow Expectations
summary: AdvanSix is back on investors' radar after a fresh update that lifts its fair value estimate from US$21.50 to US$22.50, alongside a recent US$20 price target from parts of the Street. Supporters point to this adjustment as evidence that ongoing cost work, capital discipline, and the outlook for the Plant Nutrients business still leave room for upside, while skeptics see input cost pressure and EBITDA risk keeping the risk and reward trade off fairly balanced. As you read on, you will see how...

headline: Truist Trims PT on Veeva (VEEV) Following Strong Q4 Results

headline: Truist Cuts Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Price Target as Baird Highlights Sector Opportunity
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 13, Truist lowered its price recommendation on Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (NASDAQ:HBAN) to $19 from $21. The firm reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The change came as part of a broader research note on regional banks. […]
